Syncopation involves accenting off-beats or weaker beats, often by placing notes where they disrupt the regular pulse. In option C, the rhythm "F2 z F" in 2/4 time places a quarter note on beat 1, then a rest on beat 2, and the final F on the "and" of beat 2, creating an off-beat accent. This makes C the correct choice.  

\boxed{C}
